items.headline: Cognizant Ties Physical AI Platform To Partnerships And Undervalued Shares
items.summary: Cognizant Technology Solutions (NasdaqGS:CTSH) has launched a sovereign Physical AI Platform-as-a-Service that connects and governs physical assets, sensors, and AI systems across industries. The company is widening its AI governance toolkit, including Neuro AI Trust's integration with ServiceNow, to help enterprises manage AI risk and compliance. Cognizant is deepening security collaboration with CrowdStrike and expanding work with Snowflake to support AI adoption at scale. Cognizant, a...
